data.body: EPIC COMPLETE: ba33 (courtly-linear-iguana) CLOSED + CERTIFIED (plan-review + completion-verifier, sig=certified). All 6 stories closed+signed+certified under current Ed25519 scheme. Root cause of prior unsigned state: parallel opcert epic migrated completion-signing scheme (HMAC->Ed25519) mid-flight, staling pre-migration child attestations (unknown_scheme); re-certified all 6 children under current scheme. All 6 code changes MERGED to main (687/688/692/693/695/698). Ticket descriptions restored to validated versions after foreign-session corruption. Coaching-fidelity gap closed (story a3db). DONE.
